exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId), '#', '') as OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS FLOAT) * CAST(oi.UnitPrice AS FLOAT)) as total_sales
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.Id), '#', '') = REPLACE(TRIM(oi.OrderId), '#', '')
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId), '#', '') as OwnerId, SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS FLOAT) * CAST(oi.UnitPrice AS FLOAT)) as total_sales
FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.Id), '#', '') = REPLACE(TRIM(oi.OrderId), '#', '')
WHERE DATE(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
